violations.text: Soap and paper towels were not available at the hand-washing sink. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of paper towels and hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the cake display refrigeration units. All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Thermometers are lacking in a couple of refrigeration unit(s). All cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer inside the unit that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025
